rulings.Case Title: WILMINGTON SAVINGS FUND SOCIETY, FSB VS. EMIL P MILYAKOV ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons; Mtn To Dismiss
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 10, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT EMIL MILYAKOV Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons; Mtn To Dismiss DENIED. Defendant alleges in both the moving papers and the declaration of Nevenna Apostolova that the complaint was improperly served on May 18, 2019. However, the complaint in this action was actually served aprox. 1 year prior on July 9, 2018. Defendant has not provided any argument or evidence to support quashing the July 9, 2018 service of summons. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: WILMINGTON SAVINGS FUND SOCIETY, FSB, DBA VS. EMIL P. MILYAKOV ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons; Mtn To Dismiss

rulings.Case Title: HENRY LAM VS. JIAN WEN GAO LIM ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 10, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT JIAN LIM DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend. "A complaint may plead inconsistent causes of action, although it be verified, if there are no contradictory or antagonistic facts." (Berman v. Bromberg, (1997), 56 Cal.App.4th 936, 944 citing Steiner v. Rowley (1950) 35 Cal.2d 713, 718-719.) To the extent that the complaint contains facts, rather than just legal conclusions, the facts are antagonistic as to: whether the agreement was between Defendant and Plaintiff or Plaintiff's predecessor of interest; whether Defendant stayed in possession of the premises after March 18, 2019 or Plaintiff had possession and Plaintiff broke back in using violence or threats. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: THIRD AND MISSION ASSOCIATES LLC VS. OLGA BELKINA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 10, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT OLGA BELKINA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED. Responsive pleading should be filed within 5 days of entry of this order. = (501/CFH)
